violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in the walk-in cooler. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the back storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of leaves, litter, and other debris around the refuse area. Area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The floors under the retail shelves throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The ceiling tile in front of the walk-in cooler is in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
